_source: NYC Parks Events Listing (Socrata, data.cityofnewyork.us). Three parallel tables joined by event_id: Event Listing (fudw-fgrp), Event Locations (cpcm-i88g), Event Categories (xtsw-fqvh). Real records, trimmed to the fields the client reads. Captured 2026-05; the published Event Listing freezes mid-2019, so dates here are historical and tests pin `now` to a fixture date.

listing.title: Arts, Culture & Fun: Back to the Block
listing.snippet: A Night of Music and Art. Back to the Block features NYC teen artists and up-and-coming local musicians.

listing.snippet: Join us for a free outdoor screening.

listing.snippet: A very special fundraising picnic at the Bed-Stuy Farm.

listing.snippet: A parade for dogs and their owners.
